zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Latimer於1335年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾米爾頓時，她的父親Warin le Latimer35歲，母親Catherine de la Warre31歲。她於1358年與Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1417年1月7日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Latimer于1335年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾米爾頓时，她的父亲Warin le Latimer35岁，母亲Catherine de la Warre31岁。她于1358年与Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1417年1月7日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾伍斯特享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Latimer was born in 1335, in Milton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Warin le Latimer, was 35 and her mother, Catherine de la Warre, was 31. She married Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor in 1358. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 7 January 1417, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Latimer est née en 1335, à Milton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Warin le Latimer, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Catherine de la Warre, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor en 1358. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1417, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Latimer 1335 in Milton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin le Latimer 35 und ihre Mutter Catherine de la Warre 31. Sie hat 1358 Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1417 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Latimer è nata il nel 1335 nel Milton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Warin le Latimer, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Catherine de la Warre, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor nel 1358. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 7 gennaio 1417, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Latimerが1335年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアミルトンで生まれた時，父Warin le Latimerは35歳，母Catherine de la Warreは31歳であった。1358年にSir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1417年1月7日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Latimer(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 미턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin le Latimer(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine de la Warre(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1358년 Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 1월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Latimer nasceu em 1335, em Milton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Warin le Latimer, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de la Warre, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor em 1358. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1417, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Latimer родилась в 1335 г. в местности милтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Warin le Latimer было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de la Warre, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor в 1358 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 7 января 1417 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Latimer nació en 1335, en Milton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Warin le Latimer, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Catherine de la Warre, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Allen Griffin, Knight Of Weston Favel Manor en 1358. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 7 de enero de 1417, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
